Class Blocks

java.lang.Object
net.minecraft.world.level.block.Blocks
adris.altoclef.multiversion.versionedfields.Blocks
public abstract class Blocks extends net.minecraft.world.level.block.Blocks
A helper class for block constants used by Alto Clef.
